symptom_pattern: Redis OOM error in production logs
root_cause: Session token TTL was set to 30 days instead of 30 minutes, leading to rapid key accumulation
fix_applied: Corrected session TTL in application configuration and ran flushdb on Redis

symptom_pattern: 504 Gateway Timeout during checkout spikes to 25%
root_cause: Third-party payment processor API response time spiked from 200ms to 8000ms
fix_applied: Implemented a 2-second timeout and fallback queue for background processing

symptom_pattern: PostgreSQL CPU utilization at 100%, query timeouts
root_cause: Missing index on the 'email' field in the 'users' table during a bulk user migration
fix_applied: Created index concurrently: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_users_email ON users(email);

symptom_pattern: Elasticsearch cluster yellow status and slow queries
root_cause: Unbalanced shard allocation across nodes; one node ran out of disk space (95% usage)
fix_applied: Deleted old log indices and rebalanced shards across the cluster

symptom_pattern: Push notifications failing to send, queue backlog increasing
root_cause: Expired Apple Push Notification service (APNs) certificate
fix_applied: Renewed the APNs certificate in the Apple Developer portal and updated the server configuration

symptom_pattern: Redis connection pool exhaustion / HTTP 500 errors
root_cause: Connection pool size too small (default 10) for auth service traffic spike after deployment
fix_applied: Rolled back deployment and bumped Redis MAX_POOL size to 100 in env variables

symptom_pattern: Stripe webhooks failing with 400 Bad Request
root_cause: Invalid Stripe webhook signing secret configured after key rotation
fix_applied: Updated STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET env variable with the correct signing secret

symptom_pattern: Static assets failing to load (403 Forbidden)
root_cause: AWS S3 bucket policy changed accidentally, blocking public read access to build assets
fix_applied: Reverted the S3 bucket policy change to restore public read access to static assets

symptom_pattern: Database deadlock errors during flash sale peak traffic
root_cause: Inconsistent locking order between update_inventory and reserve_item transactions
fix_applied: Refactored code to ensure locks are acquired in the same alphabetical order of tables

symptom_pattern: Kubernetes Pods restarting repeatedly (OOMKilled)
root_cause: Memory leak in Pillow image resizing logic due to unclosed file pointers
fix_applied: Wrapped image operations in 'with' context managers to ensure file closures, and redeployed

symptom_pattern: Slow API responses (avg latency > 2s) on user profile endpoints
root_cause: N+1 query database issue fetching user profiles and their corresponding active sessions
fix_applied: Updated ORM query to use select_related/preload to fetch related tables in a single query

symptom_pattern: SendGrid emails returning 401 Unauthorized
root_cause: SendGrid API key deleted or revoked from the console by security audit
fix_applied: Generated a new SendGrid API key and updated the Kubernetes secrets configuration

symptom_pattern: Double billing of user accounts during checkout
root_cause: Missing idempotency key check on payment retry mechanism in checkout endpoint
fix_applied: Added Stripe idempotency key headers using transaction request UUIDs

symptom_pattern: High latency and connection drops for live chat clients
root_cause: File descriptor limit reached (1024) on Nginx load balancer nodes
fix_applied: Increased worker_rlimit_nofile to 65535 and connection limits in nginx.conf

symptom_pattern: Nightly PDF generation jobs failing with write errors
root_cause: Local disk storage full on worker nodes due to accumulated temp files in /tmp
fix_applied: Added a cron job to clean up temporary PDF files older than 24 hours

symptom_pattern: Cannot log in, token verification failing
root_cause: System clock drift (4 minutes behind) on auth-02 server causing JWT validation to fail
fix_applied: Restarted chronyd service to force NTP sync on auth-02 server

symptom_pattern: Recommendations returned are empty (default fallback used)
root_cause: Invalid path for ML model file after continuous integration runner update
fix_applied: Fixed model load path in config/recommend.json to point to the correct volume mount

symptom_pattern: CORS errors blocking web application requests
root_cause: Wildcard CORS config overwritten by strict local environment config in latest master build
fix_applied: Reverted the CORS configuration change and re-added allowed origins in main.py

symptom_pattern: Logs are not visible in dashboard, ingestion latency high
root_cause: Kafka topic partition mismatch resulting in single partition handling 90% of traffic
fix_applied: Increased partition count from 3 to 12 and re-keyed messages by service name

symptom_pattern: PagerDuty alerts not firing for CPU usage threshold alerts
root_cause: Invalid routing key configured in PagerDuty API integration settings
fix_applied: Restored correct integration routing key from production credential store
